items.description: Developed a custom Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) without high-level ML libraries to analyze chess board states. Implemented manual backpropagation, cross-entropy loss, and multiple activation functions (ReLU, Softmax). The system processes FEN strings into 78-dimensional tensors to predict game outcomes like checkmate or stalemate.
